title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.660 - Penalty for rearresting party after discharge
text:
532.660.  Penalty for rearresting party after discharge. — Everyone who, knowing that any person has been discharged by competent authority on a habeas corpus, shall, contrary to the provisions of this chapter, arrest such person again for the same cause, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and shall also pay to the party aggrieved five hundred dollars.
(RSMo 1939 § 1651) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1487; 1919 § 1937; 1909 § 2502
